title: carex orbicularis
intro: Carex orbicularis, also known as the Round-leaved Sedge, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex orbicularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Carex orbicularis can be prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
